questions.question: 1 (a) The diagram shows part of the Periodic Table. IIIIIIIVVVIVII VIII Ca H Pt AlCl Br Ar I NOF K Answer the following questions using only the symbol of the elements in the diagram. Each symbol may be used once, more than once or not at all. State the symbol of the element that: (i) is a fuel which is a gas at room temperature .................................................
